hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); cwd=$(pwd); if [[ "$cwd" == "$HOME"/dev/SETUP_REQUIRED-projet-1* || "$cwd" == "$HOME"/dev/SETUP_REQUIRED-projet-2* ]]; then if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'git[[:space:]]+(commit|push|add|stash|merge|rebase|cherry-pick|reset)\b'; then printf '{"systemMessage":"⛔ PROJET SCOLAIRE/SENSIBLE — git interdit ici\nCommande bloquée : %s\nAutorisé : pull · fetch · log · status · diff uniquement","hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Projet scolaire/sensible — commande git modifiant lhistorique interdite"}}' "$cmd"; exit 2; fi; fi
